response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience in industrial automation, secure development lifecycle (SDL), IEC 62443, or high-performance on-prem/cloud systems required for this role; most recent work is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief C++ stint at National Instruments over 9 years ago.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong open-source contributions and technical documentation skills
Proven ability to lead and mentor through workshops and community projects
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) and SDL
No evidence of message brokers, MQTT, multi-threaded C++ systems, or IoT automation
